changes.description: Baseline run with original verbose skill (296 lines SKILL.md + 5 supporting docs)

Reduced SKILL.md from 296 lines to 35 lines. Removed all supporting docs (root-cause-tracing.md, defense-in-depth.md, condition-based-waiting.md, condition-based-waiting-example.ts, find-polluter.sh, test-academic.md, test-pressure-1/2/3.md, CREATION-LOG.md). Kept core debugging process: investigate → analyze → hypothesize → fix. Execution time improved significantly (debug-race: 4m36s → 1m56s, debug-bsearch: 3m01s → 2m20s).
